D2 Vision L2 Understand Atom

The Penrose Triangle

toggle the expose view and watch a solid-looking triangle break open into a figure that cannot exist

The visual system reads each corner as a normal right-angle join in depth, then assembles the corners into a whole the laws of solid geometry forbid.

Study the three beams: each corner looks perfectly ordinary. Toggle the expose view to slide one joint apart and see that the bars never actually meet — the solidity was an inference, not a fact.
